channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Once seen as a war hero, Australian ex-soldier will stand trial for alleged war crimes
item.description: Until a few years ago, Ben Roberts-Smith was one of Australia's most celebrated war heroes. But now, he will stand trial for alleged war crimes committed in Afghanistan.
item.content:encoded: Until a few years ago, Ben Roberts-Smith was one of Australia's most celebrated war heroes. But now, he will stand trial for alleged war crimes committed in Afghanistan.
item.dc:creator: Kristina Kukolja

item.title: Bill Gates will testify in the Epstein probe; Pam Bondi testimony postponed
item.description: Bill Gates will appear before the House Oversight Committee in June. The Department of Justice said Wednesday that former Attorney General Pam Bondi will not testify for now.
item.content:encoded:
Bill Gates will appear before the House Oversight Committee in June. The Department of Justice said Wednesday that former Attorney General Pam Bondi will not testify for now.

(Image credit: Roy Rochlin)
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger

item.title: What has the U.S. war with Iran accomplished?
item.description: Trump's war goals included putting an end to Iran's nuclear program, destroying its military capabilities and creating regime change. That hasn't happened.
item.content:encoded:
Trump's war goals included putting an end to Iran's nuclear program, destroying its military capabilities and creating regime change. That hasn't happened.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: Scott Neuman

item.title: Why OpenAI bought 'SportsCenter for Silicon Valley'
item.description: OpenAI is seeking to shape the public narrative about AI with the purchase of a niche talk show popular with Silicon Valley insiders.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI is seeking to shape the public narrative about AI with the purchase of a niche talk show popular with Silicon Valley insiders.
item.dc:creator: Shannon Bond

item.title: Greetings from downtown Cairo, where unpretentious cafés are part of centuries-old charm
item.description: Downtown Cairo, or Wust el-Balad as it's known, is a trove of hidden gems. Imprinted on every high-ceilinged building, arched balcony and iconic roundabout are relics that feel like love letters from the past.
item.content:encoded: Downtown Cairo, or Wust el-Balad as it's known, is a trove of hidden gems. Imprinted on every high-ceilinged building, arched balcony and iconic roundabout are relics that feel like love letters from the past.
item.dc:creator: Aya Batrawy

item.title: Democrats keep doing better in elections since Trump returned to office
item.description: With elections in Georgia and Wisconsin Tuesday, Democrats continued to overperform, which the party started in 2025 when it regularly improved on its margins compared to the presidential race in 2024.
item.content:encoded:
With elections in Georgia and Wisconsin Tuesday, Democrats continued to overperform, which the party started in 2025 when it regularly improved on its margins compared to the presidential race in 2024.

(Image credit: Morry Gash)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler

item.title: A humorist faces life with Stage 4 lung cancer: 'The future disappeared for me'
item.description: In 2020, Annabelle Gurwitch went to urgent care for a COVID-19 test and learned she had cancer. She writes about life as a "cancer slacker" in her memoir, The End of My Life is Killing Me.
item.content:encoded: In 2020, Annabelle Gurwitch went to urgent care for a COVID-19 test and learned she had cancer. She writes about life as a "cancer slacker" in her memoir, The End of My Life is Killing Me.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gross

item.title: Oil prices plunge and stocks soar after U.S. and Iran agree on a ceasefire
item.description: Investors around the world breathed a sigh of relief at the prospect of peace — and an easing of the global energy crisis.
item.content:encoded:
Investors around the world breathed a sigh of relief at the prospect of peace — and an easing of the global energy crisis.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
item.dc:creator: Maria Aspan

item.title: U.S., Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire. And, Trump-backed Clay Fuller wins House race
item.description: The U.S. reached a last-minute ceasefire with Iran just before Trump's deadline for the country to meet his demands. And, Trump-backed Clay Fuller wins the U.S. House race in Georgia.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. reached a last-minute ceasefire with Iran just before Trump's deadline for the country to meet his demands. And, Trump-backed Clay Fuller wins the U.S. House race in Georgia.

(Image credit: Atta Kenare)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Your sarcasm is showing — and its history is surprisingly violent
item.description: Some people use sarcasm jokingly. But funnily enough, we tend not to find it witty when we're on the receiving end.
item.content:encoded: Some people use sarcasm jokingly. But funnily enough, we tend not to find it witty when we're on the receiving end.
item.dc:creator: Ayana Archie
